evals.prompt: review Case_Escalation_Flow.flow-meta.xml — support says users sometimes get an 'unhandled fault' error banner when they close cases
evals.expected_output: Finds missing faultConnector on DML elements as the likely cause; full checklist pass with CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM findings and the standard output format

evals.prompt: we have like 6 record-triggered flows on Opportunity and updates feel slow, plus two of them seem to fight over the Stage field. can you untangle this?
evals.expected_output: Reviews trigger order/timing collisions (same object + event), recommends consolidation or orchestration; suggests sfdt flow conflicts / a scanner when available

evals.prompt: admin built a flow with 45 elements and 4 loops that scores leads. should this stay a flow or become apex? she really doesn't want to lose the ability to tweak it
evals.expected_output: Applies the Flow vs Apex decision guide (element count, loops, performance) with a balanced recommendation acknowledging admin maintainability
